title: duplicate URL.parse() calls in Accept-sending tokio::spawn block
description: In the Follow handler's tokio::spawn block (server.rs ~lines 971-977), url::Url::parse(&inbox) is called twice in succession — once for target_path and immediately again for inbox_domain — both on the same inbox string. This is a minor allocation but the double-parse is avoidable: parse once, extract both path() and host_str() from the single Url result.
close_reason: Accepted: duplicate URL::parse in a tokio::spawn that runs once per Follow accept. Negligible.
